entity.label: Rakkath
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Shore-town, a “fenced city” of the tribe of Naphtali (Josh. 19:35). The old name of Tiberias, according to the Rabbins.

nodes.label: Rakkath
nodes.description: Shore-town, a “fenced city” of the tribe of Naphtali (Josh. 19:35). The old name of Tiberias, according to the Rabbins.

verses.text: And the fenced cities are Ziddim, Zer, and Hammath, Rakkath, and Chinnereth,
